segments.scene_description: The scene presents a static first-person view inside a dimly lit basement or cellar. The camera holder's gloved hands rest on a wooden ledge in the foreground, facing a rough stone wall. A wooden support beam is visible to the left and a white pillar to the right, with no movement or changes occurring throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a dimly lit, unchanging cellar environment. It begins with the camera holder's gloved hands resting steadily on a wooden ledge in the foreground, facing a rough stone wall. The view remains fixed, framing a wooden support beam to the left and a white pillar to the right. As the gaze lingers, the scene persists in total stillness, with no shifts in lighting or movement across the stone and timber surroundings.
